## [00:00 - 00:28]

Okay, you're 75 days. You're ready to continue your follow-up today. I want you to send the client a photo mock-up, maybe customer of the month, maybe put him on GQ magazine, maybe think outside the box. Time magazine, Esquire, create some kind of photo mock-up with this client, send it out to him with a little note, you're the best. See me for 90 days when you're ready.
